creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Krzysztof from comment #23)
I consulted some people. The monitoring-plugins is fork of nagios-plugins but should stay nagios-plugins too because of users of Nagios Enterprise.
But talked with my ex-mentor and said introducing of flavors need approval of portmgr. And suggests the options instead.

So sorry but we should use options (as you wrote earlier) and if an user want use monitoring-plugins and nagios-check_clamav should install it from ports. As you wrote the net-mgmt/icinga2 is a good example.
